blended.narrative: Big White is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.4 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 4,665 ft. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
